author: Ethan Miller
text: Partial progress after refactor. DONE: nav border-b, input bar border-t/bg, Card/surface components. REMAINING: (1) landing metagame grid needs a surface container — wrap the grid div in a card with bg-surface border border-edge; (2) hero subtitle 'Before you register.' is still text-ash (#4A5878) — change to text-ink/70 at minimum.

author: Ethan Miller
text: CSS utilities largely done: glow-spark, glow-spark-sm, oracle-border all defined in globals.css and applied correctly. Input focus glow applied. Archetype bar tracks use bg-edge. Oracle response border glow applied. This bead is close to done — verify focus glow renders correctly in browser, then close.

author: Ethan Miller
text: Partial progress. DONE: user bubble uses Card component (bg-surface border border-edge), LOW=text-flame, HIGH=text-spark.
